title: Avoid redundant boolean literals
description: Comparing boolean values to true or false literals is unnecessary and makes code more complex. These redundant comparisons reduce readability and can introduce confusion about the code's intent.
recommendation: Use boolean expressions directly without comparing to true/false literals.

noncompliant.description: Comparing boolean values to true or false literals adds unnecessary complexity and reduces readability.

compliant.description: Using boolean expressions directly without redundant comparisons makes code cleaner and more readable.

checks.message: Avoid redundant boolean literals - use boolean expressions directly
